metadata.projectDescription: A multi-LLM collaborative answer system with anonymized peer review. Users ask questions, multiple LLMs provide individual responses, then anonymously rank each other's work, and a moderator synthesizes the final answer.

nodes.name: backend.main
nodes.description: FastAPI application entry point. Defines REST API endpoints for conversation management and message handling.

nodes.name: backend.config
nodes.description: Configuration module containing debate model list, moderator model, API credentials, and data paths.

nodes.name: backend.debate
nodes.description: Core 3-stage debate orchestration logic. Implements stage1_collect_responses, stage2_collect_rankings, stage3_synthesize_final.

nodes.name: backend.openrouter
nodes.description: OpenRouter API client for making LLM requests. Handles async queries with parallel execution support.

nodes.name: backend.storage
nodes.description: JSON-based conversation storage layer. Manages file I/O for persisting conversations.

nodes.name: App
nodes.description: Main React application component. Manages conversation state, loads conversations from backend.

nodes.name: ChatInterface
nodes.description: Main chat UI component. Renders conversation messages, stage visualizations, and message input.

nodes.name: Stage1
nodes.description: Displays individual model responses in tabbed interface from Stage 1.

nodes.name: Stage2
nodes.description: Displays peer evaluations and rankings from Stage 2. Shows de-anonymized model names client-side.

nodes.name: Stage3
nodes.description: Displays final synthesized answer from moderator. Green background highlights conclusion.

nodes.name: Sidebar
nodes.description: Navigation sidebar displaying conversation history with create/select/delete functionality.

nodes.name: api
nodes.description: API client for backend communication. Provides methods for conversation and message management.

nodes.name: App.css
nodes.description: Application-level styles for layout and typography.

nodes.name: index.css
nodes.description: Global styles including markdown-content class for consistent spacing.

nodes.name: ChatInterface.css
nodes.description: Chat interface styling for message layout and input area.

nodes.name: Stage1.css
nodes.description: Styling for Stage 1 tabbed interface.

nodes.name: Stage2.css
nodes.description: Styling for Stage 2 rankings display with aggregate rankings visualization.

nodes.name: Stage3.css
nodes.description: Green-tinted styling for final answer stage.

nodes.name: vite.config.js
nodes.description: Vite build configuration with React plugin.

nodes.name: OpenRouter API
nodes.description: Third-party API for accessing multiple LLM providers (OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, etc.)

nodes.name: httpx
nodes.description: Python async HTTP client library for making API requests.

nodes.name: Conversations Data
nodes.description: JSON file storage for conversation history and messages.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.description: Project overview, setup instructions, and tech stack documentation.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.description: Technical architecture notes and implementation details for developers.

edges.description: Main imports core debate orchestration functions
Main imports storage functions for conversation persistence
Main reads configuration settings
Debate module uses OpenRouter client for LLM queries
Debate module reads debate models and moderator configuration
OpenRouter client makes HTTP requests to OpenRouter API
Uses httpx async HTTP client library
Config specifies data directory path
Storage module persists conversations to JSON files
App uses API client for backend communication
App renders Sidebar component
App renders ChatInterface component
ChatInterface renders Stage1 component conditionally
ChatInterface renders Stage2 component conditionally
ChatInterface renders Stage3 component conditionally
ChatInterface uses API to send messages
Stage2 receives metadata from API response for de-anonymization
App component uses stylesheet
ChatInterface component uses stylesheet
Stage1 component uses stylesheet
Stage2 component uses stylesheet
Stage3 component uses stylesheet
Frontend API client makes HTTP requests to backend REST API
Main endpoint handlers read/write through storage module

stageOne.description: User query sent to all debate models in parallel

stageTwo.description: Each model anonymously ranks other responses
steps: Stage 1 responses anonymized as Response A, B, C, etc.
Label-to-model mapping created (not sent to models)
Parsing extracts FINAL RANKING from each evaluation
Aggregate rankings computed from all peer evaluations
Results sent to frontend with metadata
Moderator model receives all responses and rankings
Final synthesized answer returned to frontend
Each user message stored with metadata
Stage results (stage1, stage2, stage3) stored per message
backend:storage manages file I/O to data/conversations/

tiers.name: External Services
tiers.description: Unified interface to multiple LLM providers

keyFeatures.name: Multi-Model Collaboration
keyFeatures.description: Query multiple LLMs simultaneously for diverse perspectives

keyFeatures.name: Anonymized Peer Review
keyFeatures.description: Models rank each other without knowing model identities to prevent bias

keyFeatures.name: Transparent Evaluation
keyFeatures.description: Users can inspect all intermediate results (Stage 1, 2, 3) in tabbed interface

keyFeatures.name: Client-Side De-anonymization
keyFeatures.description: Model names revealed to users only after evaluation for transparency

keyFeatures.name: Graceful Degradation
keyFeatures.description: System continues with successful responses if some models fail

keyFeatures.name: Conversation History
keyFeatures.description: JSON-based storage of all conversations with full metadata
